scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.sync: git add . && (git commit -m "Auto-sync updates" || echo "No changes to commit") && git push
scripts.auto-sync: npx nodemon --watch . --ext ts,tsx,js,css,json --ignore node_modules/ --ignore backend/outputs/ --ignore .git/ --delay 10 --exec "npm run sync"
